title: schizachyrium tenerum var. cirratum
intro: Schizachyrium tenerum var. cirratum, also known as Cirrata Switch Grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Schizachyrium tenerum var. cirratum include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cirrata Switch Grass may be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
